window_summary: This window tracks the evolution of yeasy/docker_practice from early foundational releases through major content revisions and into the modern v1.x series, highlighting key additions like Docker Compose, Swarm, and BuildKit, as well as ongoing maintenance and dependency updates.

chunks.title: v0.9.0-rc1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: yeasy/docker_practice
Release: v0.9.0-rc1
Tag: v0.9-rc1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2017-11-29T03:02:00Z; created_at: 2017-11-29T02:49:36Z
Release notes:
# 变更日志
本书内容将基于 Docker CE v17.MM 进行重新修订，计划 2017 年底发布 0.9.0 版本。
## 0.9-rc1 (2017-11-29)
### 新增
* 根据最新版本（v17.09）修订内容 #192
* 增加 `Dockerfile` 多阶段构建( `multistage builds` ) `Docker 17.05` 新增特性 #226
* 增加 `docker exec` 子命令介绍 #240
* 增加 `docker` 管理子命令 `container` `image` `network` `volume` 介绍 #203
* 增加 `树莓派单片电脑` 安装 Docker
* 增加 Docker 存储驱动 `OverlayFS` 相关内容 #250
### 更新
* 更新 `Docker CE` `v17.x` 安装说明 #192
* 更新 `Docker 网络` 一节 #251
* 更新 `Docker Machine` 基于 0.13.0 版本
* 更新 `Docker Compose` 基于 3 文件格式 #238
### 删除
* 删除 `Docker Swarm` 相关内容，替换为 `Swarm mode` `Docker 1.12.0` 新增特性 #235
* 删除 `docker run` `--link` 参数 #215
### 精简
* 精简 `Docker Registry` 一节 #180
### 替换
* 替换 `docker run` `-v` 参数为 `--mount` #214
### 错误修复
* 替换 `404` 链接
### 排版
* 优化文字排版 #223
* 增加离线阅读功能 #216
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice release v0.9.0-rc1, the book content is revised based on Docker CE v17.MM. New additions include Dockerfile multistage builds (Docker 17.05 feature), docker exec subcommand introduction, docker management subcommands (container, image, network, volume), Raspberry Pi installation, and OverlayFS storage driver. Updates cover Docker CE v17.x installation, Docker networking, Docker Machine based on 0.13.0, and Docker Compose based on file format 3. Removals include Docker Swarm content replaced by Swarm mode, and docker run --link parameter. The Docker Registry section is simplified, docker run -v is replaced with --mount, broken links are fixed, and text formatting is optimized with offline reading support added.

chunks.title: v0.9.0-rc2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: yeasy/docker_practice
Release: v0.9.0-rc2
Tag: v0.9-rc2; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2017-12-09T12:36:55Z; created_at: 2017-12-09T12:05:20Z
Release notes:
# 变更日志
本书内容将基于 Docker CE v17.MM 进行重新修订，计划 2017 年底发布 0.9.0 版本。
## 0.9-rc2 (2017-12-09)
### 新增
* 增加 Docker 中文资源链接 #264
* 增加介绍基于 Docker 的 CI/CD 工具 `Drone` #261
* 增加 `docker secret` 相关内容 #282
* 增加 `docker config` 相关内容 #283
* 增加 `LinuxKit` 相关内容 #287
### 更新
* 更新 `CoreOS` 章节 #222
* 更新 `etcd` 章节，基于 3.x 版本 #275
### 删除
* 删除 `Docker Compose` 中的 `links`指令 #215
### 替换
* 替换 `docker daemon` 命令为 `dockerd` #270
* 替换 `docker ps` 命令为 `docker container ls` #279
* 替换 `docker images` 命令为 `docker image ls` #279
### 错误修复
* 修改 `安装 Docker` 一节中部分文字表述
* 修复内容逻辑错误 #258
* 修复`404` 链接
* 移除历史遗留文件和错误的文件 #290
### 排版
* 优化文字排版
* 调整目录结构
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice release v0.9.0-rc2, new content includes Docker Chinese resource links, introduction of the CI/CD tool Drone, docker secret and docker config commands, and LinuxKit. Updates cover CoreOS and etcd (based on 3.x). Removals include the links directive in Docker Compose. Replacements change docker daemon to dockerd, docker ps to docker container ls, and docker images to docker image ls. Fixes address text in the Docker installation section, content logic errors, broken links, and removal of legacy files. Text formatting and directory structure are also improved.

chunks.title: v0.3.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: yeasy/docker_practice
Release: v0.3.0
Tag: v0.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2017-12-31T02:49:18Z; created_at: 2014-11-25T05:40:01Z
Release notes:
## Compare
* https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/compare/v0.2...v0.3
## 0.3.0 (2014-11-25)
* 完成仓库章节
* 重写安全章节
* 修正底层实现章节的架构、命名空间、控制组、文件系统、容器格式等内容
* 添加对常见仓库和镜像的介绍
* 添加 Dockerfile 的介绍
* 重新校订中英文混排格式
* 修订文字表达
* 发布繁体版本分支：zh-Hant
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice release v0.3.0, the release notes complete the repository chapter, rewrite the security chapter, correct the underlying implementation chapter (architecture, namespaces, control groups, file systems, container formats), add introductions to common repositories and images, add Dockerfile introduction, revise Chinese-English mixed formatting, revise text expressions, and publish a traditional Chinese version branch (zh-Hant).

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice release v1.4.0, the release notes list various contributions including updates to best practices, npm registry mirror, secret documentation, image/build documentation, Mac installation requirements, registry mirrors configuration, typo fixes, HTTP/HTTPS proxy documentation, volume documentation, installation updates, offline installation fixes, aliyun mirror configuration, CI workflow fixes, Raspberry Pi OS installation error solution, GPG suggestions for Debian 11, Ubuntu documentation update, Django requirement update, README update, and overview image fix.

* 合并 Ubuntu、Debian 安装文档 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/121
* 将 "名字空间" 改为 "命名空间" by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/125
* 标出需要注意的图标，之前的提交忘记添加标注了。 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/124
* 重新改写"镜像列表"章节 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/123
* 补充镜像加速器WINDOWS10下的说明 by @sugov5 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/126
* 更新 book.json，代码色彩高亮换为默认的 highlight，并去除已经不再使用的 autocover 等 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/127
* 重写定制镜像章节 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/128
* 在 Mac 的配置界面上标记出来加速器的配置位置 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/129
* Fix #8 hide the github button if it's mobile by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/133
* 修正 image/commit.md 中的图片链接错误 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/132
* 重写删除镜像章节 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/135
* 修正 --build-arg 的参数的说明以适应 Docker 1.13 的变化 by @twang2218 in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/137
* Fix issue #139: fix typo, change from 意外 to 以外 by @chenshenyou in https://github.com/yeasy/docker_practice/pull/140
* 修复错误描述 by @tianmingxing in...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice release v1.7.0, the release notes list numerous contributions including terminology changes (名字空间 to 命名空间), typo fixes, formatting improvements, image link fixes, content additions and rewrites for Docker introduction, basic concepts, installation guides (Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS, macOS), mirror accelerator configuration, image customization, and various other documentation improvements.

questions.query_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice releases, which release adds the CI/CD tool Drone and the docker secret command?

answer_support.answer_text: 增加介绍基于 Docker 的 CI/CD 工具 Drone ... 增加 docker secret 相关内容

questions.query_text: Across the yeasy/docker_practice releases, how does the content change described in v0.5.0 differ from the content change described in v1.1.0?

options.text: v0.5.0 adds Compose, Machine, Swarm, and Mesos projects, while v1.1.0 adds BuildKit, docker buildx, and docker manifest, and removes older OS support.
v0.5.0 removes Docker Swarm content, while v1.1.0 adds Docker Swarm content.
Both releases only fix typos and formatting.
v0.5.0 introduces Docker CE v17.MM revision, while v1.1.0 introduces Docker CE v19.x revision.

questions.expected_answer: v0.5.0 adds Compose, Machine, Swarm, and Mesos projects, while v1.1.0 adds BuildKit, docker buildx, and docker manifest, and removes older OS support.

answer_support.answer_text: 添加 Compose 项目 ... 添加 Machine 项目 ... 添加 Swarm 项目 ... 添加 Mesos 项目内容
增加 BuildKit ... 增加 docker buildx 命令使用说明 ... 增加 docker manifest 命令使用说明 ... 移除 Ubuntu 14.04 Debian 8 Debian 7

questions.query_text: In the yeasy/docker_practice release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds the Machine project and fixes several bugs, (2) a release that adds the Compose, Machine, Swarm, and Mesos projects, (3) a release that adds the Etcd, Fig, CoreOS, and Kubernetes projects.

answer_support.answer_text: 添加 Etcd 项目 ... 添加 Fig 项目 ... 添加 CoreOS 项目 ... 添加 Kubernetes 项目
添加 Compose 项目 ... 添加 Machine 项目 ... 添加 Swarm 项目 ... 添加 Mesos 项目内容
补充 Machine 项目 ... 修正若干 bug
